moka.description: Coffee brewed in a stovetop moka pot, where steam pressure pushes hot water through finely ground coffee. The result is strong and concentrated—bolder than drip coffee but typically served in small espresso-sized cups.
moka.name: Moka Pot Coffee

28-black-energy-drink.description: A moderate-sized energy drink with a relatively high caffeine content, offering a strong boost in a compact can. Ideal for a quick energy surge without consuming a large volume.
28-black-energy-drink.name: 28 Black Energy Drink

3d-energy-drink.description: A large energy drink with a high caffeine content, designed for a sustained energy boost. Perfect for those who need a significant pick-me-up to stay alert and active.
3d-energy-drink.name: 3D Energy

5-hour-energy-extra-strength.description: 5-hour Energy Extra Strength is a concentrated 1.93-fl-oz energy shot designed to deliver a fast surge of alertness. Each shot contains roughly 230 mg of caffeine—about the amount in a tall (16 oz) coffee—making it one of the most caffeine-dense ready-to-drink products on the market.
5-hour-energy-extra-strength.name: 5 Hour Energy Extra Strength

americano.description: A simple coffee made by diluting espresso with hot water, offering a strong, smooth flavor with less intensity than pure espresso.
americano.name: Americano

atkins-iced-coffee-protein-shake.description: Atkins Iced Coffee Protein Shake is a ready-to-drink, coffee-based protein beverage marketed to low-carb and keto consumers. Each 11 fl oz (325 ml) shake contains roughly the same caffeine as a typical cup of brewed coffee—about 95 mg—providing a mild energy boost alongside 15 g of protein.
atkins-iced-coffee-protein-shake.name: Atkins Iced Coffee Protein Shake

bang-energy-drink.description: A high-caffeine energy drink designed for a powerful energy boost, often consumed before workouts or intense activities. It also contains other performance-enhancing ingredients like BCAAs and electrolytes.
bang-energy-drink.name: Bang Energy Drink

burn.description: An energy drink with a distinct taste, popular for its effectiveness in providing a quick energy boost. It's often consumed before workouts or during long work hours.
burn.name: Burn

c4-energy-drink.description: A high-caffeine energy drink designed to boost energy and focus, commonly used before workouts.
c4-energy-drink.name: C4 Energy drink

caff-latte.description: Caffè Latte (often just "Latte") is an espresso-based coffee beverage made with one or more shots of espresso and steamed milk, giving it a relatively moderate caffeine level compared with straight espresso or drip coffee.
caff-latte.name: Caffè Latte

caffe-nero-americano.description: Espresso diluted with hot water, resulting in a smoother, less intense coffee flavor, similar to brewed coffee.
caffe-nero-americano.name: Caffé Nero Americano

caffe-nero-caffe-latte.description: A milder espresso-based drink made with steamed milk, providing a creamy texture with a more subtle coffee flavor.
caffe-nero-caffe-latte.name: Caffé Nero Caffé Latte

caffe-nero-cappuccino.description: A classic espresso-based drink with steamed milk and a thick layer of foam, offering a smooth and frothy coffee experience.
caffe-nero-cappuccino.name: Caffé Nero Cappuccino

caffe-nero-espresso.description: A strong, concentrated coffee served in a small shot, offering a bold and intense flavor. Perfect for a quick caffeine hit.
caffe-nero-espresso.name: Caffé Nero Espresso

caffe-nero-espresso-con-panna.description: A rich espresso served with a dollop of whipped cream, adding a sweet and creamy contrast.
caffe-nero-espresso-con-panna.name: Caffé Nero Espresso Con Panna

caffe-nero-espresso-macchiato.description: An espresso topped with a small amount of frothed milk, balancing the boldness of the coffee with a creamy touch.
caffe-nero-espresso-macchiato.name: Caffé Nero Espresso Macchiato

caffe-nero-frappe-latte.description: A chilled, blended espresso drink with milk, perfect for a refreshing, iced coffee treat.
caffe-nero-frappe-latte.name: Caffé Nero Frappe Latte

caffe-nero-iced-latte.description: A cold version of the classic latte, made with chilled espresso and milk for a smooth, refreshing beverage.
caffe-nero-iced-latte.name: Caffé Nero Iced Latte

caffe-nero-mocha.description: A delicious combination of espresso, chocolate, and steamed milk, topped with whipped cream for a sweet, dessert-like coffee experience.
caffe-nero-mocha.name: Caffé Nero Mocha

caffe-nero-mocha-frappe-latte.description: A blended, iced version of the mocha, combining espresso, chocolate, and milk for a rich, frozen coffee treat.
caffe-nero-mocha-frappe-latte.name: Caffé Nero Mocha Frappe Latte

cappuccino-double.description: Capuccino with two shots of espresso.
cappuccino-double.name: Cappuccino - Double

carabao-energy-drink.description: A moderately caffeinated energy drink with a sweet, fruity flavor, commonly consumed for a quick energy boost throughout the day or before physical activities.
carabao-energy-drink.name: Carabao Energy Drink

celsius-blood-orange-lemonade.description: A revitalizing mix of blood orange and lemonade flavors, enhanced with BCAAs for muscle recovery.
celsius-blood-orange-lemonade.name: Celsius Blood Orange Lemonade

celsius-inferno-punch.description: A fiery blend of fruit punch flavors packed with 300 mg of caffeine for an intense energy boost.
celsius-inferno-punch.name: Celsius Inferno Punch

celsius-jackfruit.description: An exotic, high-caffeine energy drink featuring the unique taste of tropical jackfruit.
celsius-jackfruit.name: Celsius Jackfruit

celsius-peach-mango-green-tea.description: A harmonious blend of juicy peach and mango flavors with a hint of green tea, offering a non-carbonated option.
celsius-peach-mango-green-tea.name: Celsius Peach Mango Green Tea

celsius-sparkling-grapefruit.description: A zesty, stevia-sweetened sparkling drink with the tangy bite of pink grapefruit.
celsius-sparkling-grapefruit.name: Celsius Sparkling Grapefruit

celsius-sparkling-orange.description: A vibrant, citrus-infused sparkling drink reminiscent of freshly squeezed oranges.
celsius-sparkling-orange.name: Celsius Sparkling Orange

celsius-sparkling-watermelon.description: A refreshing, bubbly beverage capturing the sweet essence of ripe watermelon.
celsius-sparkling-watermelon.name: Celsius Sparkling Watermelon

celsius-tart-cherry-lime.description: A tart yet sweet combination of cherry and lime flavors, complemented by BCAAs for post-workout support.
celsius-tart-cherry-lime.name: Celsius Tart Cherry Lime

cheerwine.description: A regional favorite, this cherry soda has a caffeine level comparable to other soft drinks.
cheerwine.name: Cheerwine

cheerwine-diet.description: A cherry-flavored diet soda with moderate caffeine, offering a sweet alternative to standard colas.
cheerwine-diet.name: Cheerwine Diet

coca-cola-cherry.description: A popular cherry-flavored variant of Coca-Cola, with a caffeine content on par with other Coke varieties.
coca-cola-cherry.name: Coca-Cola Cherry

coca-cola-diet-cherry.description: A diet version of Cherry Coke, offering a moderate caffeine content with a cherry flavor.
coca-cola-diet-cherry.name: Coca-Cola Diet Cherry

coca-cola-diet-cherry-1.description: A diet version of Cherry Coke, offering a moderate caffeine content with a cherry flavor.
coca-cola-diet-cherry-1.name: Coca-Cola Diet Cherry

coca-cola-light.description: A low-calorie cola with a moderate caffeine content, offering the classic Coke flavor with less sugar.
coca-cola-light.name: Coca-Cola Light

costa-americano.description: Made by diluting espresso with hot water, this drink has a smooth and full-bodied coffee flavor.
costa-americano.name: Costa Americano

costa-cappuccino.description: An espresso-based drink with equal parts of steamed milk and foam, providing a strong coffee flavor complemented by the sweetness of the milk.
costa-cappuccino.name: Costa Cappuccino

costa-espresso.description: A concentrated coffee shot made from finely ground coffee beans, delivering a bold and intense flavor. Ideal for those who prefer a quick and powerful caffeine hit.
costa-espresso.name: Costa Espresso

costa-flat-white.description: A rich espresso-based drink made with microfoam milk, offering a strong coffee flavor with a smooth, velvety texture.
costa-flat-white.name: Costa Flat White

costa-latte.description: A milky coffee drink with steamed milk and a small amount of foam, providing a creamy and mild flavor.
costa-latte.name: Costa Latte

crystal-light.description: Crystal Light is a powdered, low-calorie drink mix that is typically caffeine–free, but its Energy/With Caffeine line adds caffeine from tea extract. One stick (packet) intended to flavor 16 fl oz of water delivers about 60 mg of caffeine, equivalent to 30 mg per standard 8 fl oz (240 ml) serving of the prepared beverage.
crystal-light.name: Crystal Light

dark-chocolate-45-59.description: A rich and slightly bitter treat, dark chocolate contains a moderate amount of caffeine that varies with cocoa content, providing a small energy boost along with antioxidants.
dark-chocolate-45-59.name: Dark Chocolate (45-59%)

dark-chocolate-60-69.description: A rich and slightly bitter treat, dark chocolate contains a moderate amount of caffeine that varies with cocoa content, providing a small energy boost along with antioxidants.
dark-chocolate-60-69.name: Dark Chocolate (60-69%)

dark-chocolate-70-85.description: A rich and slightly bitter treat, dark chocolate contains a moderate amount of caffeine that varies with cocoa content, providing a small energy boost along with antioxidants.
dark-chocolate-70-85.name: Dark Chocolate (70-85%)

diet-coke.description: A low-calorie cola with a moderate caffeine content, offering the classic Coke flavor with less sugar.
diet-coke.name: Diet Coke

dr-pepper.description: A unique flavored soda with a blend of 23 flavors and a moderate caffeine amount. Known for its distinctive taste.
dr-pepper.name: Dr. Pepper

drip-coffee.description: It’s a classic, widely consumed coffee preparation method where hot water slowly passes through ground coffee beans, extracting flavors and caffeine.
drip-coffee.name: Drip coffee

dunkin-americano.description: Made with espresso shots diluted with hot water, the Americano offers a robust and full-bodied coffee experience with a higher caffeine content compared to other espresso drinks.
dunkin-americano.name: Dunkin' Americano

dunkin-cappuccino.description: Features espresso with equal parts steamed milk and foam, providing a rich and creamy texture with a strong coffee flavor.
dunkin-cappuccino.name: Dunkin' Cappuccino

dunkin-dunkaccino.description: A mix of coffee and hot chocolate, offering a sweet and mildly caffeinated beverage that’s perfect for those who enjoy a balanced blend of flavors.
dunkin-dunkaccino.name: Dunkin' Dunkaccino

dunkin-espresso.description: A concentrated coffee shot with a strong and bold flavor, perfect for a quick energy boost. Dunkin’s espresso is slightly more caffeinated than Starbucks, offering a potent caffeine kick.
dunkin-espresso.name: Dunkin' Espresso

dunkin-hot-chocolate.description: A classic hot chocolate with minimal caffeine, ideal for a comforting, warm beverage with a rich chocolate flavor.
dunkin-hot-chocolate.name: Dunkin' Hot Chocolate

dunkin-hot-tea.description: Traditional hot tea with a robust flavor and moderate to high caffeine content, making it a great choice for tea lovers seeking a strong, warming beverage.
dunkin-hot-tea.name: Dunkin' Hot Tea

dunkin-iced-latte.description: Chilled espresso with milk, offering a smooth and creamy iced coffee experience with a moderate caffeine level.
dunkin-iced-latte.name: Dunkin' Iced Latte

dunkin-iced-macchiato.description: An iced version of the strong macchiato, combining bold espresso with cold milk, perfect for a refreshing yet potent coffee fix.
dunkin-iced-macchiato.name: Dunkin' Iced Macchiato

dunkin-iced-tea.description: Refreshing cold tea with a moderate caffeine boost, ideal for a light and revitalizing drink on warm days.
dunkin-iced-tea.name: Dunkin' Iced Tea

dunkin-latte.description: A smooth blend of espresso and steamed milk with a light layer of foam. The latte is creamy and mild, making it an excellent choice for those who enjoy a balanced coffee flavor.
dunkin-latte.name: Dunkin' Latte

dunkin-macchiato.description: A strong espresso-based drink with layered milk, offering a pronounced coffee flavor. It’s among Dunkin’s higher caffeine options, making it a solid choice for a noticeable energy lift.
dunkin-macchiato.name: Dunkin' Macchiato

dunkin-matcha-latte.description: A smooth and creamy beverage made with finely ground matcha green tea powder, blended with steamed milk. It offers a vibrant green color.
dunkin-matcha-latte.name: Dunkin' Matcha Latte

dunkin-vanilla-chai.description: A spiced tea with a sweet vanilla flavor, offering a moderate caffeine boost with a warm, aromatic taste.
dunkin-vanilla-chai.name: Dunkin' Vanilla Chai

espresso.description: A highly concentrated coffee brewed by forcing hot water through finely-ground coffee beans. Known for its intense flavor and strong caffeine kick.
espresso.name: Espresso

eternal-energy.description: Eternal Energy is a 2-fl-oz (59 ml) energy shot positioned as an affordable alternative to brands like 5-Hour Energy. A single shot delivers about 190 mg of caffeine (Extra Strength varieties reach ~280 mg), giving users a rapid, concentrated boost with virtually no sugar or carbonation.
eternal-energy.name: Eternal Energy

fast-twitch.description: Fast Twitch is a ready-to-drink, sugar-free energy beverage launched by Gatorade in 2023 and positioned for athletic performance.
fast-twitch.name: Fast Twitch

faygo-cola.description: A regional soda brand offering a caffeine content similar to other mainstream colas.
faygo-cola.name: Faygo Cola

full-throttle.description: Full Throttle is a citrus-flavored carbonated energy drink (now owned by Monster Beverage) sold primarily in 16 fl oz cans. The standard 16 fl oz serving delivers roughly 160 mg of caffeine, placing it in the mid-range for large energy drinks and giving it about 10 mg of caffeine per fluid ounce.
full-throttle.name: Full Throttle

fuze-tea.description: A blend of tea and fruit flavors, with some caffeine. It's a modern and flavorful iced tea option.
fuze-tea.name: Fuze Tea

gamersups.description: GamerSupps GG is a sugar-free powdered energy drink formulated for gamers; a single scoop mixed with water provides a moderate stimulant boost. The brand’s official FAQ states that each serving (one scoop/packet) delivers 100 mg of caffeine, roughly equivalent to a small cup of coffee. Because it is consumed as a beverage, caffeine is absorbed rapidly, with most of it entering the bloodstream within about 30–40 minutes.
gamersups.name: Gamersups

generic-caffeine-pill.description: Generic caffeine pills are solid oral tablets containing anhydrous caffeine, most commonly in 200 mg (extra-strength) or 100 mg (regular strength) doses. Because the caffeine is measured and compressed into a pill, the stimulant content is highly consistent, making them a popular, precisely dosed alternative to coffee or energy drinks.
generic-caffeine-pill.name: Generic Caffeine Pill

ghost.description: Ghost Energy Drink is a zero-sugar, carbonated energy beverage marketed by Ghost Lifestyle. Each 16 fl oz can delivers a hefty 200 mg of caffeine—roughly the same as two strong cups of coffee—providing a rapid, high-stim stimulant effect with nootropics added.
ghost.name: Ghost

gorgie.description: Gorgie is a sparkling energy drink made with green-tea–sourced caffeine and no added sugar. Each 12-fl-oz can delivers about 120 mg of caffeine—roughly the same as a small drip coffee—providing a lighter, fruit-forward alternative to traditional canned energy drinks.
gorgie.name: Gorgie

gorilla-mind-energy-drink.description: Gorilla Mind Energy Drink is a carbonated nootropic energy beverage that delivers 200 mg of naturally-sourced caffeine in a 12-fl-oz slim can. Marketed for focus and performance, it combines a high caffeine dose with L-theanine and other cognitive ingredients, putting it at the stronger end of mainstream energy drinks.
gorilla-mind-energy-drink.name: Gorilla Mind Energy Drink

gorilla-mode-preworkout.description: Gorilla Mode Pre-Workout is a powdered supplement that is mixed with water and consumed before training. Each level scoop contains 175 mg of caffeine anhydrous, with the label explicitly allowing up to two scoops (350 mg) per serving, putting it at the higher end of pre-workout caffeine doses. Because it is taken as a liquid drink, caffeine is absorbed rapidly, similar to most energy drinks.
gorilla-mode-preworkout.name: Gorilla Mode Pre-workout

green-tea.description: A very popular tea. Has a lot of variation based on brewing time and amount of tea used. Values very approximate.
green-tea.name: Green Tea

guayak-yerba-mate.description: Guayakí Yerba Mate is an organic, yerba-mate–based beverage line that delivers a smooth, tea-like energy boost. Ready-to-drink cans and bottles contain roughly the same caffeine as a medium cup of coffee (≈140-150 mg), while the company’s single-serve tea bags brew a milder 40 mg per bag. Its caffeine is naturally extracted from yerba-mate leaves, providing sustained alertness without added synthetic stimulants.
guayak-yerba-mate.name: Guayakí Yerba Mate

hell-energy-drink.description: A moderately caffeinated energy drink with a sweet, fruity taste, often consumed for a quick energy boost or during physical activities.
hell-energy-drink.name: Hell Energy Drink

hell-ice-coffee.description: Hell Ice Coffee is a ready-to-drink iced coffee line produced by the Hungarian energy-drink company Hell Energy. The flagship Cappuccino/Latte variant is sold in 250 ml slim cans and delivers a moderate caffeine hit of about 40 mg (≈16 mg/100 ml), noticeably lower than the brand’s energy drinks but similar to other canned coffees. Variants such as Double Espresso contain more caffeine, yet the overall range remains in the mid-strength coffee segment.
hell-ice-coffee.name: Hell Ice Coffee

hot-cocoa.description: Hot cocoa is a comforting beverage that contains a small amount of caffeine due to its cocoa content.
hot-cocoa.name: Hot Cocoa

instant-coffee.description: A quick and convenient coffee option made by rehydrating dried coffee crystals in hot water. It offers a moderate caffeine kick.
instant-coffee.name: Instant Coffee

jet-alert-caffeine-pill.description: Jet Alert Caffeine Pills are over-the-counter caffeine tablets marketed as an alertness aid.
jet-alert-caffeine-pill.name: Jet Alert Caffeine Pill

jocko-go.description: Jocko GO Energy Drink (also marketed as Jocko Discipline GO Ready-to-Drink) is a sugar-free, 12-fl-oz canned energy drink created by Jocko Fuel. Each can delivers 95 mg of naturally sourced caffeine (green tea & raw coffee bean), providing a moderate boost compared with many mainstream energy drinks. The formula emphasizes nootropics and cleaner ingredients, keeping caffeine at a level similar to a small cup of coffee rather than the high doses found in larger 16-oz energy drinks.
jocko-go.name: Jocko GO

k-cup.description: A convenient single-serve coffee brewed using K-Cup pods, with caffeine levels varying by brand and blend. Perfect for a quick and consistent caffeine fix.
k-cup.name: K-Cup

kirkland-breakfast-blend.description: Kirkland Signature Breakfast Blend is a light-roast 100 % Arabica coffee sold by Costco in ground bags and single-serve K-Cup pods. Laboratory tests and retailer-supplied figures put a brewed 8 fl oz cup at roughly 95–100 mg of caffeine, while each K-Cup pod delivers about 120 mg. Because it is a light roast, it retains slightly more caffeine per gram than darker Kirkland roasts.
kirkland-breakfast-blend.name: Kirkland Breakfast Blend

lipton-iced-tea.description: A refreshing iced tea with a hint of caffeine, perfect for cooling down on a hot day. It’s widely available and comes in various flavors.
lipton-iced-tea.name: Lipton Iced Tea

lucky-energy.description: Lucky Energy is a carbonated energy drink that comes primarily in 250 ml cans and follows the standard European formulation of 32 mg of caffeine per 100 ml. A single 250 ml can therefore delivers about 80 mg of caffeine, putting it on par with classic energy-drink competitors like Red Bull. Because it is consumed as a liquid, caffeine from Lucky Energy is absorbed quickly, with most uptake occurring within 30–45 minutes.
lucky-energy.name: Lucky Energy

madmonq.description: MADMONQ is a chewable nootropic tablet marketed to gamers that delivers caffeine together with vitamins, adaptogens and herbal extracts. Each tablet contains 100 mg of natural caffeine (about the same as a small cup of coffee), providing a controlled, convenient energy boost without liquid intake.
madmonq.name: MADMONQ

matcha-tea.description: A finely powdered green tea with high caffeine content, offering a strong energy boost and a rich, earthy flavor.
matcha-tea.name: Matcha Tea

mccafe-americano.description: A classic coffee drink from McDonald's McCafé line, made by diluting a rich espresso shot with hot water.
mccafe-americano.name: McCafé Americano

mccafe-cappuccino.description: A rich espresso-based drink from McDonald's McCafé line, blended with steamed milk and topped with a layer of creamy foam.
mccafe-cappuccino.name: McCafé Cappuccino

mccafe-caramel-cappuccino.description: A rich caramel espresso-based drink from McDonald's McCafé line, blended with steamed milk and topped with a layer of creamy foam.
mccafe-caramel-cappuccino.name: McCafé Caramel Cappuccino

mccafe-caramel-macchiato.description: A delightful blend of rich espresso, steamed milk, and a sweet caramel drizzle, topped with a light layer of foam.
mccafe-caramel-macchiato.name: McCafé Caramel Macchiato

mccafe-latte.description: A smooth and creamy espresso-based drink from McDonald's McCafé line, featuring a generous amount of steamed milk and a light layer of foam.
mccafe-latte.name: McCafé Latte

mccafe-mocha.description: A delicious combination of rich espresso, steamed milk, and chocolate syrup, topped with whipped cream.
mccafe-mocha.name: McCafé Mocha

mio-energy.description: MiO Energy is a concentrated liquid water-enhancer made by Kraft Heinz. One 2 mL squeeze (½ teaspoon) added to 8 fl oz (240 mL) of water delivers about 60 mg of caffeine, allowing users to customize strength.
mio-energy.name: Mio Energy

monster-energy-assault.description: A bold, slightly tart energy drink with a darker, more complex flavor. It provides a reliable caffeine boost wrapped in a distinct taste experience.
monster-energy-assault.name: Monster Energy Assault

monster-energy-import.description: A European-inspired version with a smooth carbonation and subtly refined taste. It’s a balanced option for those who want a slightly different twist on the classic formula.
monster-energy-import.name: Monster Energy Import

monster-energy-java.description: A creamy blend of coffee and energy ingredients, offering a balanced caffeine hit. It’s smoother than traditional energy drinks for those who prefer a coffee-forward profile.
monster-energy-java.name: Monster Energy Java

monster-energy-java-300.description: Java Monster 300 blends rich coffee flavors with smooth energy in every sip. It’s ideal for those who crave a robust coffee experience paired with a serious caffeine kick.
monster-energy-java-300.name: Monster Energy Java 300

monster-energy-juice.description: A fruit-infused energy drink that blends sweet, juicy flavors with a standard caffeine kick. It’s a more flavorful choice for those who enjoy a fruitier beverage.
monster-energy-juice.name: Monster Energy Juice

monster-energy-mango-loco.description: A mango-forward juice blend loaded with tropical sweetness. It’s a fruit-heavy pick for those seeking a more exotic flavor experience.
monster-energy-mango-loco.name: Monster Energy Mango Loco

monster-energy-mega-drink.description: This larger-sized energy drink provides a sweet, familiar flavor and a moderate caffeine load. It’s convenient when you need a bigger serving to get you through a long day.
monster-energy-mega-drink.name: Monster Energy Mega Drink

monster-energy-mule.description: A ginger-infused variant that delivers a spicier, more robust flavor profile. It’s a unique option for those seeking something beyond the standard sweet taste.
monster-energy-mule.name: Monster Energy Mule

monster-energy-nitro.description: Nitrogen-infused for a smoother, creamier texture, this drink offers a slightly different mouthfeel. It’s a refined twist on the classic energy formula.
monster-energy-nitro.name: Monster Energy Nitro

monster-energy-pipeline-punch.description: A tropical-inspired blend with vibrant fruit flavors and a familiar energy boost. It’s a brighter choice for fans of more exotic tastes.
monster-energy-pipeline-punch.name: Monster Energy Pipeline Punch

monster-energy-rehab.description: A tea and lemonade fusion delivering a lighter, less sweet energy drink experience. It’s a refreshing choice with fewer calories and moderate caffeine.
monster-energy-rehab.name: Monster Energy Rehab

monster-energy-reserve.description: A variant with a cleaner flavor profile while maintaining the energy kick. It’s for those who want something subtly different without straying far from the original.
monster-energy-reserve.name: Monster Energy Reserve

monster-energy-ultra.description: A lighter, less sweet, zero-sugar variant with a crisp, refreshing taste. It’s designed for those wanting energy without extra calories.
monster-energy-ultra.name: Monster Energy Ultra

monster-energy-ultra-black.description: A bold black cherry flavor with a smooth finish.
monster-energy-ultra-black.name: Monster Energy Ultra Black

monster-energy-ultra-blue.description: A lighter, less sweet, zero-sugar variant with a crisp, refreshing taste. It’s designed for those wanting energy without extra calories.
monster-energy-ultra-blue.name: Monster Energy Ultra Blue

monster-energy-ultra-fiesta.description: A juicy mango flavor that brings a festive vibe.
monster-energy-ultra-fiesta.name: Monster Energy Ultra Fiesta

monster-energy-ultra-gold.description: A sweet pineapple flavor inspired by golden fruits.
monster-energy-ultra-gold.name: Monster Energy Ultra Gold

monster-energy-ultra-paradise.description: A tropical blend featuring kiwi, lime, and cucumber flavors.
monster-energy-ultra-paradise.name: Monster Energy Ultra Paradise

monster-energy-ultra-peachy-keen.description: A juicy peach flavor that’s both sweet and tangy.
monster-energy-ultra-peachy-keen.name: Monster Energy Ultra Peachy Keen

monster-energy-ultra-red.description: A mixed berry flavor offering a sweet and tart balance.
monster-energy-ultra-red.name: Monster Energy Ultra Red

monster-energy-ultra-rosa.description: A delicate mix of pink grapefruit and strawberry flavors.
monster-energy-ultra-rosa.name: Monster Energy Ultra Rosa

monster-energy-ultra-sunrise.description: Bright citrus and orange notes, reminiscent of a morning sunrise.
monster-energy-ultra-sunrise.name: Monster Energy Ultra Sunrise

monster-energy-ultra-violet.description: A blend of citrus and grape flavors for a unique taste.
monster-energy-ultra-violet.name: Monster Energy Ultra Violet

monster-energy-ultra-watermelon.description: A refreshing watermelon flavor perfect for summer.
monster-energy-ultra-watermelon.name: Monster Energy Ultra Watermelon

monster-energy-zero-sugar.description: A zero-sugar option that retains the familiar Monster feel and flavor. It’s suitable for those watching their sugar intake but still craving caffeine.
monster-energy-zero-sugar.name: Monster Energy Zero Sugar

mountain-dew.description: A citrus-flavored soda with a higher caffeine content than typical sodas. It's known for its vibrant flavor and energy-boosting properties.
mountain-dew.name: Mountain Dew

mountain-dew-code-red.description: A cherry-flavored variant of Mountain Dew with higher caffeine content. It’s popular for its bold taste and energizing effect.
mountain-dew-code-red.name: Mountain Dew Code Red

mountain-dew-kickstart.description: Mountain Dew Kickstart is a lightly-carbonated juice beverage produced by PepsiCo that sits between a soda and an energy drink. A standard 16 fl oz (473 ml) can contains 90 mg of caffeine—about half the caffeine of most full-strength energy drinks but more than a typical soft drink—which gives it a moderate stimulant profile without the very high doses found in dedicated energy drinks.
mountain-dew-kickstart.name: Mountain Dew Kickstart

nescafe-3-in-1-instant-coffee.description: Nescafe 3 in 1 instant coffee packets contain a blend of instant coffee, sugar, and creamer.
nescafe-3-in-1-instant-coffee.name: Nescafé 3 in 1 Instant Coffee

nescafe-classic.description: A popular instant coffee known for its rich, bold flavor and moderate caffeine content, making it a convenient option for a quick and energizing cup.
nescafe-classic.name: Nescafé Classic

nescafe-dolce-gusto-cafe-au-lait.description: A smooth coffee-milk blend with moderate caffeine.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-cafe-au-lait.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Café Au Lait

nescafe-dolce-gusto-cafe-au-lait-intenso.description: A bolder version of café au lait with higher caffeine.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-cafe-au-lait-intenso.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Café Au Lait Intenso

nescafe-dolce-gusto-caffe-grande-intenso.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Caffe Grande Intenso

nescafe-dolce-gusto-capuccino.description: A classic cappuccino with a strong caffeine boost.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-capuccino.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Capuccino

nescafe-dolce-gusto-capuccino-skinny.description: A lower-calorie cappuccino with slightly less caffeine.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-capuccino-skinny.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Capuccino Skinny

nescafe-dolce-gusto-espresso.description: A standard espresso shot with a strong flavor and moderate caffeine.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-espresso.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Espresso

nescafe-dolce-gusto-espresso-intenso.description: A strong and intense espresso shot.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-espresso-intenso.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Espresso Intenso

nescafe-dolce-gusto-latte-macchiato.description: A creamy, layered espresso drink with moderate caffeine.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-latte-macchiato.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Latte Macchiato

nescafe-dolce-gusto-lungo.description: A longer espresso shot with moderate caffeine.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-lungo.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Lungo

nescafe-dolce-gusto-lungo-intenso.description: An intense lungo with high caffeine for a stronger coffee experience.
nescafe-dolce-gusto-lungo-intenso.name: Nescafé Dolce Gusto - Lungo Intenso

nescafe-gold.description: A smooth, premium instant coffee with moderate caffeine content.
nescafe-gold.name: Nescafé Gold

nescafe-ice-java.description: An iced coffee with a high caffeine level, offering a refreshing option.
nescafe-ice-java.name: Nescafé Ice Java

nespresso-vertuo-pod-150-ml.description: Nespresso Vertuo Gran Lungo pods brew a 150 ml (5 fl oz) coffee that contains a relatively high caffeine load for a single-serve capsule. According to Nespresso’s official FAQ, Gran Lungo (150 ml) capsules range from 120 mg to 200 mg of caffeine, so an average pod delivers roughly 150 mg, making it stronger than a typical drip-coffee cup of similar size.
nespresso-vertuo-pod-150-ml.name: Nespresso Vertuo Pod (150 ml)

nespresso-vertuo-pod-230-ml.description: Nespresso Vertuo coffee pods brew a 230 ml cup of drip-style coffee in the Vertuo line machines. According to Nespresso’s own FAQ and independent lab measurements, a single 230 ml Vertuo pod delivers roughly 150–180 mg of caffeine, so an average pod contains about 170 mg, making it stronger than most drip coffees per serving.
nespresso-vertuo-pod-230-ml.name: Nespresso Vertuo Pod (230 ml)

nespresso-vertuo-pod-230-ml-20-caffeine.description: Nespresso’s Vertuo 230 ml “+20% Caffeine” (BOOST) pods – such as Stormio Boost and Melozio Boost – brew a full coffee-size mug and are formulated with 20 % more ground coffee than the regular Vertuo blends. Each pod yields about 200 mg of caffeine, giving a strong yet balanced cup that sits at the upper end of home-brewed drip coffee strength.
nespresso-vertuo-pod-230-ml-20-caffeine.name: Nespresso Vertuo Pod (230 ml, +20% Caffeine)

nespresso-vertuo-pod-25-ml.description: Nespresso Vertuo Ristretto (25 ml) is the smallest-volume Vertuo capsule, designed to deliver a short, intense espresso-style coffee. Despite its small size, each pod contains roughly 60 mg of caffeine, giving it one of the highest caffeine-to-volume ratios in the Nespresso lineup. This makes it a quick, concentrated shot for those seeking a rapid caffeine boost.
nespresso-vertuo-pod-25-ml.name: Nespresso Vertuo Pod (25 ml)

nespresso-vertuo-pod-40-ml.description: Nespresso Vertuo Pods brewed as a 40 ml espresso deliver a concentrated shot of coffee with a moderate caffeine punch. Nespresso’s own laboratory data and independent analyses place the caffeine between 55–65 mg per capsule, averaging about 60 mg for most Vertuo espresso blends. Because the serving is only 40 ml, this translates to roughly 44 mg of caffeine per fluid ounce—stronger by volume than standard drip coffee.
nespresso-vertuo-pod-40-ml.name: Nespresso Vertuo Pod (40 ml)

nestea.description: A popular iced tea brand with a light caffeine content, perfect for a refreshing drink on hot days.
nestea.name: Nestea

nodoz-caffeine-pill.description: NoDoz is an over-the-counter caffeine tablet marketed as an alertness aid. The most common U.S. product, NoDoz Max Strength, delivers a concentrated 200 mg dose of anhydrous caffeine per pill—roughly the same caffeine as two strong cups of coffee—allowing rapid, convenient intake without liquid.
nodoz-caffeine-pill.name: NoDoz Caffeine Pill

oca-energy-drink.description: Oca Energy Drink is a plant-based energy beverage made from cassava root and natural caffeine extracted from green coffee beans. A 12 fl oz (355 ml) can delivers about 120 mg of caffeine, giving it a moderate to high stimulant effect comparable to many mainstream energy drinks. The drink markets itself as a ‘clean’ energy source with steady release and no crash.
oca-energy-drink.name: Oca

old-town-white-coffee.description: OldTown White Coffee is a popular Malaysian instant 3-in-1 "white" coffee made from roasted coffee beans, non-dairy creamer and sugar. Laboratory analyses and published nutrition panels show it contains roughly 55-65 mg of caffeine per 38–40 g sachet, similar to a small cup of regular instant coffee. Because it is prepared by dissolving one sachet in hot water, a typical 240 ml cup delivers about 60 mg of caffeine, a moderate dose compared with brewed coffee.
old-town-white-coffee.name: Old Town White coffee

pepsi.description: A popular cola beverage with a slightly sweeter taste than Coca-Cola. It provides a similar caffeine kick and is enjoyed by many for its distinct flavor.
pepsi.name: Pepsi

pepsi-cherry.description: The cherry variant of Pepsi, with slightly less caffeine than regular Pepsi.
pepsi-cherry.name: Pepsi Cherry

pepsi-diet-cherry.description: A diet version of Cherry Pepsi with a moderate caffeine content, providing a fruity twist to the traditional cola flavor.
pepsi-diet-cherry.name: Pepsi Diet Cherry

prime-energy-drink.description: A high-caffeine drink designed to boost energy and focus, available in various fruity flavors.
prime-energy-drink.name: Prime Energy Drink

red-bull.description: The classic flavor that started it all, offering a sweet, tangy taste.
red-bull.name: Red Bull

red-bull-blue-edition.description: A sweet blueberry flavor for berry enthusiasts.
red-bull-blue-edition.name: Red Bull Blue Edition

red-bull-coconut-edition.description: A blend of coconut and berry flavors for a tropical sensation.
red-bull-coconut-edition.name: Red Bull Coconut Edition

red-bull-green-edition.description: An exotic dragon fruit flavor offering a unique taste experience.
red-bull-green-edition.name: Red Bull Green Edition

red-bull-peach-edition.description: A juicy peach and nectarine fusion for a sweet and tangy profile.
red-bull-peach-edition.name: Red Bull Peach Edition

red-bull-red-edition.description: A refreshing watermelon flavor, perfect for a fruity twist.
red-bull-red-edition.name: Red Bull Red Edition

red-bull-sugarfree.description: A sugar-free version of the classic Red Bull energy drink, providing the same stimulating effects without the added sugars.
red-bull-sugarfree.name: Red Bull Sugarfree

red-bull-summer-edition.description: A seasonal offering combining strawberry and apricot flavors.
red-bull-summer-edition.name: Red Bull Summer Edition

red-bull-tropical-edition.description: A tropical fruit blend that brings a taste of the tropics.
red-bull-tropical-edition.name: Red Bull Tropical Edition

red-bull-winter-edition.description: A limited-time pomegranate flavor for the colder months.
red-bull-winter-edition.name: Red Bull Winter Edition

red-bull-zero.description: A calorie-free version with a slightly different taste profile, sweetened with artificial sweeteners.
red-bull-zero.name: Red Bull Zero

reign.description: Reign Total Body Fuel is a high-stim energy drink marketed for fitness and performance, supplied in 16 fl oz (473 ml) cans. Each can contains 300 mg of "natural caffeine"—among the highest levels in mainstream ready-to-drink beverages—providing a strong, fast-acting stimulant effect. Its caffeine concentration averages about 0.64 mg per millilitre (18.8 mg per fluid ounce).
reign.name: Reign (US)

rip-it-citrus-x.description: Rip It Citrus X is a 16-fl-oz, citrus-flavored energy drink in the Rip It Energy Fuel line made by National Beverage Corp. Like the other full-sugar Rip It flavors, a single can contains about 160 mg of caffeine (≈9.5 mg per fl oz), giving drinkers a strong, fast-acting stimulant dose. Its caffeine is absorbed quickly, with most of the dose reaching the bloodstream within roughly half an hour.
rip-it-citrus-x.name: Rip It Citrus X

semtex.description: A Czech energy drink with a bold flavor.
semtex.name: Semtex

shasta-cola.description: A budget-friendly cola with a typical caffeine level, suitable for regular cola drinkers.
shasta-cola.name: Shasta Cola

solo-energy-drink.description: Solo Energy Drink is a carbonated energy beverage produced by Solo Beverage Company (Trinidad & Tobago).
solo-energy-drink.name: Solo Energy Drink

starbucks-cafe-mocha.description: Combines rich espresso with steamed milk and chocolate syrup, topped with whipped cream. It offers a sweet and creamy coffee experience with a chocolaty twist.
starbucks-cafe-mocha.name: Starbucks Café Mocha

starbucks-caffe-latte.description: An espresso-based drink with steamed milk and a light layer of foam, providing a creamy and mild coffee experience. It can be customized with various syrups and toppings.
starbucks-caffe-latte.name: Starbucks Caffe Latte

starbucks-cappuccino.description: Features equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and a thick layer of foam. This drink provides a strong coffee flavor complemented by the sweetness of the milk foam.
starbucks-cappuccino.name: Starbucks Cappuccino

starbucks-caramel-macchiato.description: An espresso-based drink with steamed milk, vanilla syrup, and a caramel drizzle. It offers a balanced sweetness with a rich coffee undertone.
starbucks-caramel-macchiato.name: Starbucks Caramel Macchiato

starbucks-espresso.description: A concentrated coffee shot with a robust and intense flavor, perfect for a quick and powerful caffeine boost.
starbucks-espresso.name: Starbucks Espresso

starbucks-flat-white.description: Made with ristretto espresso shots and steamed whole milk, this drink offers a smooth, velvety texture and a slightly sweet, rich coffee flavor.
starbucks-flat-white.name: Starbucks Flat White

starbucks-white-mocha.description: A delicious blend of espresso, steamed milk, and white chocolate syrup, topped with whipped cream.
starbucks-white-mocha.name: Starbucks White Mocha

suntory-boss-iced-long-black.description: Suntory Boss Iced Long Black (also marketed in the U.S. as “BOSS Coffee Flash Brew – Long Black”) is an unsweetened, ready-to-drink canned coffee made with flash-brewed Arabica beans. The 8.1 fl oz (237 ml) can delivers a notably strong dose of about 140 mg of caffeine, comparable to a double espresso while remaining smooth and low-acid.
suntory-boss-iced-long-black.name: Suntory Boss Iced Long Black

swiss-miss-hot-chocolate.description: A rich and creamy hot cocoa mix made with real milk for a classic chocolate flavor.
swiss-miss-hot-chocolate.name: Swiss Miss Hot Chocolate

tea-black.description: A popular and robust tea made from fully oxidized tea leaves, offering a rich and bold flavor.
tea-black.name: Tea (Black)

tea-green.description: A delicate and aromatic tea made from unoxidized leaves, known for its fresh and slightly grassy flavor.
tea-green.name: Tea (Green)

tea-herbal.description: A caffeine-free option, often used for relaxation and wellness, with a variety of flavors depending on the herbs used.
tea-herbal.name: Tea (Herbal)

tea-jasmine.description: A caffeine-free option, often used for relaxation and wellness, with a variety of flavors depending on the herbs used.
tea-jasmine.name: Tea (Jasmine)

true-north-home.description: True North Home is a zero-sugar, zero-calorie sparkling energy drink that relies on plant-based caffeine from organic green coffee beans.
true-north-home.name: True North Home

twist-energy-drink.description: Twist Energy Drink is a carbonated energy beverage that follows the standard European energy-drink formulation of 32 mg of caffeine per 100 ml.
twist-energy-drink.name: Twist Energy Drink

v8-energy-black-cherry.description: A deep, bold black cherry flavor offering a satisfying fruity experience.
v8-energy-black-cherry.name: V8+ Energy Black Cherry

v8-energy-diet-cranberry-raspberry.description: A low-calorie option combining tart cranberry with sweet raspberry flavors.
v8-energy-diet-cranberry-raspberry.name: V8+ Energy Diet Cranberry Raspberry

v8-energy-diet-strawberry-lemonade.description: A light, tangy blend of strawberries and lemonade in a diet-friendly formulation.
v8-energy-diet-strawberry-lemonade.name: V8+ Energy Diet Strawberry Lemonade

v8-energy-honeycrisp-apple-berry.description: A crisp blend of honeycrisp apple with assorted berry flavors for a balanced sweetness.
v8-energy-honeycrisp-apple-berry.name: V8+ Energy Honeycrisp Apple Berry

v8-energy-orange-pineapple.description: A citrusy blend combining the tang of orange with sweet pineapple notes.
v8-energy-orange-pineapple.name: V8+ Energy Orange Pineapple

v8-energy-peach-mango.description: A tropical fusion of juicy peach and ripe mango flavors.
v8-energy-peach-mango.name: V8+ Energy Peach Mango

v8-energy-pomegranate-blueberry.description: A rich mix of tart pomegranate and sweet blueberry flavors.
v8-energy-pomegranate-blueberry.name: V8+ Energy Pomegranate Blueberry

v8-energy-sparkling-black-cherry.description: A fizzy take on the bold black cherry flavor for a sparkling experience.
v8-energy-sparkling-black-cherry.name: V8+ Energy Sparkling Black Cherry

v8-energy-sparkling-lemon-lime.description: A zesty combination of lemon and lime flavors with a sparkling twist.
v8-energy-sparkling-lemon-lime.name: V8+ Energy Sparkling Lemon Lime

v8-energy-sparkling-orange-pineapple.description: A carbonated version of the citrusy orange and sweet pineapple blend.
v8-energy-sparkling-orange-pineapple.name: V8+ Energy Sparkling Orange Pineapple

v8-energy-sparkling-strawberry-kiwi.description: A bubbly mix of sweet strawberry and tangy kiwi flavors.
v8-energy-sparkling-strawberry-kiwi.name: V8+ Energy Sparkling Strawberry Kiwi

v8-energy-strawberry-banana.description: A classic combination of sweet strawberries and creamy banana flavors.
v8-energy-strawberry-banana.name: V8+ Energy Strawberry Banana

v8-energy-tropical-green.description: An exotic mix featuring tropical fruits with a hint of greens for a refreshing taste.
v8-energy-tropical-green.name: V8+ Energy Tropical Green

vivarin-caffeine-pill.description: Vivarin is an over-the-counter caffeine tablet marketed as a mental alertness aid. Each pill delivers a concentrated 200 mg dose of anhydrous caffeine—about the same as two strong cups of coffee—making it one of the more potent single-serving caffeine products available.
vivarin-caffeine-pill.name: Vivarin

wooooo-energy-drink.description: Wooooo! Energy Drink is a zero-sugar 16 fl oz canned energy drink released in 2023 by pro-wrestling legend Ric Flair. The label states 200 mg of caffeine per can, putting it in the mid-to-high range compared with most mainstream energy drinks. Its moderate taurine and B-vitamin blend gives a typical rapid caffeine uptake similar to other carbonated energy beverages.
wooooo-energy-drink.name: Wooooo! Energy Drink

merrild-red.name: Merrild Red
merrild-red.description: Merrild Red is a medium-roast Danish ground/whole-bean coffee produced by Merrild (now part of Lavazza). When brewed as standard filter coffee, it delivers a caffeine kick typical of regular drip coffee, averaging about 95 mg per 240 ml cup. Because the product is not decaffeinated and uses 100 % Arabica beans, its caffeine level is within the normal range for medium-roast filter coffees.

merrild-special.name: Merrild Special
merrild-special.description: Merrild Special is a medium-roast ground/bean coffee blend produced by the Danish brand Merrild (part of JDE Peet’s). When prepared as standard drip or filter coffee, it delivers caffeine amounts typical for regular brewed coffee – roughly 40 mg per 100 ml, or about 95 mg in a normal 240 ml cup. Because the product is an ordinary Arabica/Robusta coffee blend with no decaffeination, its caffeine profile is comparable to other medium-roast filter coffees.

peter-larsen-kaffe-original-72.name: Peter Larsen Kaffe Original 72
peter-larsen-kaffe-original-72.description: Peter Larsen Kaffe Original 72 is a ready-to-drink cold-brew coffee from the Danish roaster Peter Larsen Kaffe. Steeped for 72 hours, it is marketed as a strong, smooth coffee with a relatively high caffeine concentration of about 80 mg per 100 ml, giving roughly 160 mg in its standard 200 ml bottle. Because it is 100 % coffee with no added milk, the caffeine profile is comparable to other specialty cold brews rather than regular iced coffee.

paulaner-spezi.name: Paulaner Spezi
paulaner-spezi.description: Paulaner Spezi is a German cola-orange soft drink made by the Paulaner brewery. Like most cola-based sodas it contains added caffeine, but the orange lemonade dilutes it to about 6 mg per 100 ml—roughly one-third less caffeine than regular cola. A typical 0.5 L bottle therefore delivers only around 30 mg of caffeine, making it a comparatively mild caffeine source.

excedrin.name: Excedrin
excedrin.description: Excedrin is an over-the-counter pain-relief medicine that combines acetaminophen and aspirin with caffeine. Each Extra Strength or Migraine caplet supplies 65 mg of caffeine, making the medication a solid-dose source of caffeine rather than a beverage.

caffeine-powder.name: Caffeine powder
caffeine-powder.description: Caffeine powder is virtually 100 % anhydrous caffeine sold in bulk form, intended to be mixed into drinks or supplements. Because it is pure, even tiny amounts deliver extremely high caffeine doses: a single teaspoon can contain more than 3 g of caffeine, far exceeding safe daily limits.

nocco-bcaa.name: Nocco BCAA
nocco-bcaa.description: NOCCO BCAA is a Swedish carbonated energy drink fortified with branched-chain amino acids, vitamins and caffeine. The standard 330 ml sugar-free can delivers a high 180 mg dose of caffeine, positioning it alongside strong pre-workout and functional energy beverages. Its caffeine is identical to that found in coffee and is rapidly absorbed when consumed cold and carbonated.

nocco-focus.name: Nocco Focus
nocco-focus.description: NOCCO Focus is a sugar-free, carbonated energy drink from the Swedish brand NOCCO that is marketed for mental alertness. Each 330 ml can contains a high 180 mg dose of caffeine (about 0.55 mg/ml), putting it at the stronger end of ready-to-drink energy beverages.

irish-tea.name: Irish Tea
irish-tea.description: Irish Tea (commonly sold as Irish Breakfast Tea) is a robust black‐tea blend that typically contains slightly more Assam leaf than standard English Breakfast teas, giving it a strong, malty flavor and a moderate caffeine kick. Most laboratory tests and brand disclosures show 40–60 mg of caffeine per 240 ml brewed cup, depending on steep time and blend. Its caffeine profile is similar to other black teas but lower than coffee and most energy drinks.

reign-uk.name: Reign (UK)
reign-uk.description: Reign is the European formulation of Monster Beverage’s Reign Total Body Fuel, sold in 500 ml cans and marketed as a performance energy drink. The UK recipe carries 39 mg of caffeine per 100 ml, giving each can a total of about 200 mg—lower than the 300 mg found in the US 16 oz version. It is therefore a high-caffeine, zero-sugar energy drink intended for pre-workout or functional use.

yerba-mat-tea.name: Yerba Maté (Tea)
yerba-mat-tea.description: Yerba Maté is a South-American herbal tea made from the leaves of Ilex paraguariensis. Its caffeine concentration is generally higher than most green or black teas but lower than drip coffee, delivering a smooth, sustained stimulant effect that many users describe as balanced and less jittery. Typical preparations supply roughly 70–90 mg of caffeine per 240 ml cup, though strength varies with leaf quantity, temperature, and steeping time.

nespresso-classic-pod-25-ml.name: Nespresso Classic Pod (25 ml)
nespresso-classic-pod-25-ml.description: Nespresso Classic Pods are single-serve OriginalLine espresso capsules intended to be extracted as a 25 ml “ristretto/espresso” shot. According to Nespresso’s own FAQ and independent caffeine databases, a standard Classic espresso capsule delivers roughly 55-65 mg of caffeine, with most references converging around 60 mg for a 25 ml pull. This places it in the moderate espresso range, giving a high caffeine concentration per millilitre.

nespresso-classic-pod-40-ml.name: Nespresso Classic Pod (40 ml)
nespresso-classic-pod-40-ml.description: A Nespresso Classic Pod is a single-serve aluminum capsule designed for OriginalLine Nespresso machines. When brewed as the standard 40 ml espresso size it delivers an intense coffee shot containing roughly 55–65 mg of caffeine, putting it in the mid-range for espresso beverages.

turkish-coffee.name: Turkish Coffee
turkish-coffee.description: Turkish coffee is a strong, unfiltered style of coffee traditionally brewed from very finely ground Arabica beans simmered in a small pot (cezve) and served in 50–70 ml demitasse cups. Because the grounds remain in the cup and extraction time is long, it delivers espresso-like strength, averaging ~50 mg of caffeine per 60 ml serving, but can vary with bean roast and grind.

blue-tokai-dhak-blend.description: Blue Tokai's Dhak Blend is an espresso capsule crafted from a blend of Indian single-origin beans, delivering a bold, full-bodied shot with notes of dark chocolate and a smooth, lingering finish. Each capsule yields approximately 60 mg of caffeine per 30–40 ml espresso shot.
blue-tokai-dhak-blend.name: Blue Tokai Dhak Blend

blue-tokai-silver-oak-blend.description: Blue Tokai's Silver Oak Blend is a balanced espresso capsule combining washed and natural-processed Indian coffees, producing a bright, medium-bodied shot with hints of caramel and citrus. Each capsule delivers approximately 60 mg of caffeine per 30–40 ml espresso shot.
blue-tokai-silver-oak-blend.name: Blue Tokai Silver Oak Blend

blue-tokai-vienna-roast.description: Blue Tokai's Vienna Roast capsule features a dark-roasted Indian blend, offering a rich, smoky espresso shot with a bittersweet cocoa backbone and low acidity. Each capsule contains approximately 60 mg of caffeine per 30–40 ml espresso shot.
blue-tokai-vienna-roast.name: Blue Tokai Vienna Roast

blue-tokai-attikan-estate.description: Blue Tokai's Attikan Estate capsule is a single-origin espresso from the Attikan Estate in Karnataka, delivering a clean, sweet shot with notes of milk chocolate and dried fruit. Each capsule provides approximately 60 mg of caffeine per 30–40 ml espresso shot.
blue-tokai-attikan-estate.name: Blue Tokai Attikan Estate

arizona-arnold-palmer.description: A refreshing half iced tea and half lemonade, perfect for cooling down on a hot day.
arizona-arnold-palmer.name: Arizona Arnold Palmer Half and Half
